questions.text: Which of the following describes a key bottleneck related to Index Selection?
options: Inefficient scaling of Composite Index column ordering rules (left-most prefix rules).
questions.correct_answer: Inefficient scaling of Composite Index column ordering rules (left-most prefix rules).
questions.explanation: The topic covers how Composite Index column ordering rules (left-most prefix rules) scales under concurrent workloads, which represents the primary bottlenecks.
